data.body: New module ~120 lines. Constants for MANAGED_HOOKS (post-commit, post-merge) and KNOTS_HOOK_MARKER. Functions: resolve_hooks_dir, is_knots_managed, install_hook, uninstall_hook, check_hooks (DoctorCheck), install_hooks, uninstall_hooks, hooks_status. Hook template runs kno sync in background, chains existing hooks via .local suffix. Includes unit tests for install/uninstall/idempotency/preservation/core.hooksPath.
data.title: Create src/git_hooks.rs module with hook install/uninstall/detect/status logic
